title: Add BB Homeo Care logo and update site branding

requirements.text: Generate and save the BB Homeo Care logo as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/bb-homeo-care-logo.png, recreating the uploaded logo: a circular emblem with interlocking leaf/petal shapes in sage green, muted teal/slate blue, and warm sandy beige, with a small green sprout and two dots at the center, enclosed in a thin green circle outline. Below the emblem, the text 'BB HOMEO CARE' in spaced sage-green uppercase letters and 'BALANCED BEING' in smaller warm sandy/peach uppercase letters. White/light grey background.

quotes: add this as logo and make it accordingly in our site bb means balanced being

acceptanceCriteria: Logo visually matches the uploaded reference: circular leaf emblem with sage green, teal, and sandy beige tones
Text 'BB HOMEO CARE' and 'BALANCED BEING' are legible in the logo

requirements.text: Replace the current text-only brand name in the Layout header with the BB Homeo Care logo image (frontend/public/assets/generated/bb-homeo-care-logo.png). Display the logo at an appropriate header size (height ~48px on desktop, ~36px on mobile) with alt text 'BB Homeo Care – Balanced Being'. The logo should link to the home page.

quotes: add this as logo and make it accordingly in our site

acceptanceCriteria: Header displays the logo image instead of plain text branding
Logo is sized appropriately for desktop and mobile viewports
Clicking the logo navigates to the home page
Alt text is set to 'BB Homeo Care – Balanced Being'

requirements.text: Update the site's color theme to align with the logo palette: primary/accent green should use the sage green from the logo (approx. #7A9E7E or equivalent OKLCH), secondary accent should use the warm sandy/peach tone (approx. #D4A57A or equivalent), and a muted teal/slate (approx. #5E7E8A or equivalent) for highlights. Apply these consistently across buttons, headings, navigation active states, and the hero section on the Home page so the overall site feel matches the calm, natural, holistic brand of the logo.

quotes: make it accordingly in our site bb means balanced being

acceptanceCriteria: Primary green color updated to sage green matching the logo palette
Sandy/peach accent color introduced and used on secondary elements
Muted teal accent applied to highlight elements
Buttons, headings, and nav active states use the updated palette
Home page hero section reflects the refreshed brand colors
No harsh or clashing colors; the overall aesthetic remains calm and natural

requirements.text: Update the Home page hero section (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to display the BB Homeo Care logo prominently above the hero headline, and update any hardcoded clinic name text to 'BB Homeo Care' with the tagline 'Balanced Being' displayed beneath it in the sandy/peach accent color.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image appears in the hero section above the headline
Tagline 'Balanced Being' appears beneath the clinic name in the sandy/peach accent color
Hero layout remains clean and readable on all screen sizes

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Logo image must be served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/, not through the backend
nonGoals: Changing backend logic or data models
Uploading or hosting the original WhatsApp image directly — a regenerated version will be used

required: Circular holistic wellness logo with interlocking leaf and petal shapes in sage green, muted teal-slate, and warm sandy beige, a small green sprout with two dots at the center, enclosed in a thin sage green circle outline; below the emblem the text 'BB HOMEO CARE' in wide-spaced sage green uppercase sans-serif letters and 'BALANCED BEING' in smaller warm sandy/peach uppercase letters, on a clean white background (bb-homeo-care-logo.dim_512x512.png)
